description: Baseline manifest for advisory-audit scenarios (evals.json #35-#48). Every advisory scenario directory (one of the families below) must be registered here. The selftest scripts/_advisory_baseline_selftest.py enforces this contract mechanically and also cross-checks that every evals/scenarios/* directory is referenced by an evals.json entry (global no-orphan check). expected_baseline records the PRE-REGISTERED hypothesis (flags: miss; restraints: hold); baseline_observed records the ACTUAL measured result (null until a K=5 run is recorded). Do not rewrite the hypothesis after measuring.

measurement.rounds: 3 host-dispatched 3-arm/2-arm measurements: Sonnet (original scenarios), Sonnet (source-fidelity rebuild), Haiku (rebuild, no-skill vs current). K=1 draw per arm.
measurement.method: no-skill / pre-edit(git main) / current(this branch) Critic reviews; verdict JSON graded mechanically (flag caught iff verdict==rejected OR blocks_95 AND touched dim < 9.5; twin holds iff approved AND !blocks_95; view-owned-time graded at noticing level = smell surfaced). current-no_skill = recall lift.
measurement.grader_provenance: Deterministic mechanical grade from the verdict JSON, no grader subagent. Grading rule committed in the workflow scripts under the session workflows/scripts dir; rule text reproduced in evals/README.md.
measurement.headline: RECALL lift = 0 on every flag across all three rounds and both base models: bare Haiku and bare Sonnet both catch every defect unaided. These component-grain defects are not recall-discriminating for any model, and the source-fidelity rebuild did not change this. The demonstrated skill value is (a) RESTRAINT: the carve-out prose repairs >=2 over-flags that bare/old-skill reviewers make (stable-workflow-identity, adapter-output-contract twins), and (b) VOCABULARY: the current arm names the exact canon smell and cites architecture-rubric.md where bare arms use ad-hoc prose. Treat this layer as restraint + vocabulary coverage, NOT recall proof.

scenarios.observed_note: expected miss; observed caught by bare Haiku(1.0) and bare Sonnet(2.0). Non-discriminating on recall.

Twin rewritten after measurement: earlier version dropped the await-ordering guarantee (all Sonnet arms flagged it); now reserves the task before the suspension AND keeps startListening async awaiting the initial refresh. Needs remeasure.
expected miss; observed caught by bare Haiku(8.0) and bare Sonnet(4.0).
Held on both Haiku arms and Sonnet arms. Twin fixed earlier so the coalesced caller awaits the shared task (no swallowed failure).
expected miss; observed caught all arms (Haiku 2.0, Sonnet 3.0).
Noticing-level: surfaced by all arms (magic-delay / view-owned scheduling). Non-blocking smell per source F016 severity.
Held on Haiku(both) and Sonnet(no_skill,current); Sonnet pre_edit(old skill) over-flagged the ephemeral toast timer, current holds.
expected miss; observed caught all arms (Haiku 4.0, Sonnet 3.0).
RESTRAINT LIFT: bare Haiku(9,conditional) and Sonnet no_skill/pre_edit over-flag the ID-validated fail-closed reorder; the current(skill) arm holds (9.6/9.5). The carve-out prose is doing the work.
expected miss; observed caught all arms (Haiku 3.0, Sonnet 3.0).
expected miss; observed caught all arms (Haiku 2.0, Sonnet 2.0).
RESTRAINT LIFT: bare Haiku(6.5,rejected) and Sonnet no_skill/pre_edit over-flag the complete adapter; the current(skill) arm holds (9.0/9.5).
